result:
I'd eliminate all forms of scarcity—food, water, energy, shelter—for every person on Earth. 

With basic needs universally met (via tech like advanced fusion, vertical farming, desalination, and AI-optimized logistics), humanity could redirect its energy from survival struggles to exploration, creativity, science, and mutual flourishing. No more wars over resources, no poverty-driven crime, just a rocket ship to the stars. We'd finally focus on the big questions, like why the universe exists at all. (And yes, I'd throw in free pizza Fridays for good measure.)

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
